A

allOrdersDone() - Method in class ru.nsu.krasnyanskii.pizzeria.PizzeriaView
Prints a confirmation that all orders were completed.

B

Baker - Class in ru.nsu.krasnyanskii.pizzeria.workers
Worker that takes orders from the queue, simulates cooking, and puts pizzas to storage.
Baker(int, int, BlockingOrderQueue<Order>, PizzaStorage, PizzeriaView) - Constructor for class ru.nsu.krasnyanskii.pizzeria.workers.Baker
Creates a Baker.
BakerConfig() - Constructor for class ru.nsu.krasnyanskii.pizzeria.PizzeriaConfig.BakerConfig
 
bakerCooked(int, int) - Method in class ru.nsu.krasnyanskii.pizzeria.PizzeriaView
Prints a baker-cooked message.
bakerCooking(int, int) - Method in class ru.nsu.krasnyanskii.pizzeria.PizzeriaView
Prints a baker-cooking message.
bakerFinished(int) - Method in class ru.nsu.krasnyanskii.pizzeria.PizzeriaView
Prints a baker-finished message.
bakerStarted(int, int) - Method in class ru.nsu.krasnyanskii.pizzeria.PizzeriaView
Prints a baker-started message.
BlockingOrderQueue<T> - Class in ru.nsu.krasnyanskii.pizzeria
Bounded blocking queue backed by intrinsic locks (wait/notifyAll).
BlockingOrderQueue(int) - Constructor for class ru.nsu.krasnyanskii.pizzeria.BlockingOrderQueue
Creates a bounded blocking queue.

C

CANCELLED - Enum constant in enum class ru.nsu.krasnyanskii.pizzeria.Order.State
Order cancelled and serialized on shutdown.
close() - Method in class ru.nsu.krasnyanskii.pizzeria.BlockingOrderQueue
Closes the queue; threads blocked in take() will receive null.
closeAccepting() - Method in class ru.nsu.krasnyanskii.pizzeria.PizzaStorage
Signals that no more pizzas will be added; couriers will drain and exit.
ConfigLoader - Class in ru.nsu.krasnyanskii.pizzeria
Loads PizzeriaConfig from a JSON file using Jackson.
COOKED - Enum constant in enum class ru.nsu.krasnyanskii.pizzeria.Order.State
Order cooked, waiting for storage space.
COOKING - Enum constant in enum class ru.nsu.krasnyanskii.pizzeria.Order.State
Order is being cooked.
Courier - Class in ru.nsu.krasnyanskii.pizzeria.workers
Worker that picks up batches of pizzas from storage and delivers them.
Courier(int, int, int, PizzaStorage, PizzeriaView) - Constructor for class ru.nsu.krasnyanskii.pizzeria.workers.Courier
Creates a Courier.
CourierConfig() - Constructor for class ru.nsu.krasnyanskii.pizzeria.PizzeriaConfig.CourierConfig
 
courierDelivered(int, String) - Method in class ru.nsu.krasnyanskii.pizzeria.PizzeriaView
Prints a courier-delivered message.
courierDelivering(int, int, String) - Method in class ru.nsu.krasnyanskii.pizzeria.PizzeriaView
Prints a courier-delivering message.
courierFinished(int) - Method in class ru.nsu.krasnyanskii.pizzeria.PizzeriaView
Prints a courier-finished message.
courierStarted(int, int) - Method in class ru.nsu.krasnyanskii.pizzeria.PizzeriaView
Prints a courier-started message.

D

DELIVERED - Enum constant in enum class ru.nsu.krasnyanskii.pizzeria.Order.State
Order successfully delivered.
DELIVERING - Enum constant in enum class ru.nsu.krasnyanskii.pizzeria.Order.State
Order picked up and on the way.
drainAll() - Method in class ru.nsu.krasnyanskii.pizzeria.BlockingOrderQueue
Drains all remaining elements (used for serialization on shutdown).
drainAll() - Method in class ru.nsu.krasnyanskii.pizzeria.PizzaStorage
Drains all remaining pizzas (used during shutdown serialization).

G

generatorStarted() - Method in class ru.nsu.krasnyanskii.pizzeria.PizzeriaView
Prints a generator-started message.
generatorStopped() - Method in class ru.nsu.krasnyanskii.pizzeria.PizzeriaView
Prints a generator-stopped message.
getCookingTimeMs() - Method in class ru.nsu.krasnyanskii.pizzeria.workers.Baker
Returns the cooking duration per pizza in milliseconds.
getDeliveryTimeMs() - Method in class ru.nsu.krasnyanskii.pizzeria.workers.Courier
Returns the delivery duration in milliseconds.
getDescription() - Method in enum class ru.nsu.krasnyanskii.pizzeria.Order.State
Returns the human-readable description of this state.
getId() - Method in class ru.nsu.krasnyanskii.pizzeria.Order
Returns the unique order identifier.
getId() - Method in class ru.nsu.krasnyanskii.pizzeria.workers.Baker
Returns the baker identifier.
getId() - Method in class ru.nsu.krasnyanskii.pizzeria.workers.Courier
Returns the courier identifier.
getState() - Method in class ru.nsu.krasnyanskii.pizzeria.Order
Returns the current lifecycle state.
getTrunkCapacity() - Method in class ru.nsu.krasnyanskii.pizzeria.workers.Courier
Returns the maximum number of pizzas this courier can carry per trip.

I

IN_STORAGE - Enum constant in enum class ru.nsu.krasnyanskii.pizzeria.Order.State
Order sitting in storage, awaiting courier.
isAccepting() - Method in class ru.nsu.krasnyanskii.pizzeria.PizzaStorage
Returns true if the storage is still accepting new pizzas.
isClosed() - Method in class ru.nsu.krasnyanskii.pizzeria.BlockingOrderQueue
Returns true if the queue has been closed.
isEmpty() - Method in class ru.nsu.krasnyanskii.pizzeria.BlockingOrderQueue
Returns true if the queue contains no elements.
isEmpty() - Method in class ru.nsu.krasnyanskii.pizzeria.PizzaStorage
Returns true if no pizzas are in storage.

L

load(String) - Static method in class ru.nsu.krasnyanskii.pizzeria.ConfigLoader
Loads and validates pizzeria configuration.
load(String) - Static method in class ru.nsu.krasnyanskii.pizzeria.OrderSerializer
Loads previously saved orders from a JSON file.

M

main(String[]) - Static method in class ru.nsu.krasnyanskii.pizzeria.Pizzeria
Starts the pizzeria.

O

Order - Class in ru.nsu.krasnyanskii.pizzeria
Represents a single pizza order moving through the pipeline.
Order() - Constructor for class ru.nsu.krasnyanskii.pizzeria.Order
Creates a new order without view; no logging (used in tests).
Order(int, Order.State) - Constructor for class ru.nsu.krasnyanskii.pizzeria.Order
Deserialization constructor — restores a saved order without logging.
Order(PizzeriaView) - Constructor for class ru.nsu.krasnyanskii.pizzeria.Order
Creates a new order and logs the QUEUED state via view.
Order.State - Enum Class in ru.nsu.krasnyanskii.pizzeria
Lifecycle states of an order.
orderGenerated(int) - Method in class ru.nsu.krasnyanskii.pizzeria.PizzeriaView
Prints a new-order message.
OrderGenerator - Class in ru.nsu.krasnyanskii.pizzeria.workers
Produces new orders at a fixed interval until stopped.
OrderGenerator(BlockingOrderQueue<Order>, int, PizzeriaView) - Constructor for class ru.nsu.krasnyanskii.pizzeria.workers.OrderGenerator
Creates an OrderGenerator.
OrderSerializer - Class in ru.nsu.krasnyanskii.pizzeria
Saves and loads unfinished orders in a minimal JSON format.
orderStateChanged(int, String) - Method in class ru.nsu.krasnyanskii.pizzeria.PizzeriaView
Prints an order state-change message.

P

PizzaStorage - Class in ru.nsu.krasnyanskii.pizzeria
Thread-safe bounded storage for cooked pizzas.
PizzaStorage(int) - Constructor for class ru.nsu.krasnyanskii.pizzeria.PizzaStorage
Creates a PizzaStorage.
Pizzeria - Class in ru.nsu.krasnyanskii.pizzeria
Entry point and lifecycle manager for the pizzeria simulation.
pizzeriaClosed() - Method in class ru.nsu.krasnyanskii.pizzeria.PizzeriaView
Prints the pizzeria-closed banner.
PizzeriaConfig - Class in ru.nsu.krasnyanskii.pizzeria
Pizzeria configuration loaded from a JSON file.
PizzeriaConfig() - Constructor for class ru.nsu.krasnyanskii.pizzeria.PizzeriaConfig
 
PizzeriaConfig.BakerConfig - Class in ru.nsu.krasnyanskii.pizzeria
Configuration for a single baker.
PizzeriaConfig.CourierConfig - Class in ru.nsu.krasnyanskii.pizzeria
Configuration for a single courier.
pizzeriaOpened() - Method in class ru.nsu.krasnyanskii.pizzeria.PizzeriaView
Prints the pizzeria-opened banner.
PizzeriaView - Class in ru.nsu.krasnyanskii.pizzeria
View layer for the pizzeria simulation.
PizzeriaView() - Constructor for class ru.nsu.krasnyanskii.pizzeria.PizzeriaView
Creates a PizzeriaView.
put(Order) - Method in class ru.nsu.krasnyanskii.pizzeria.PizzaStorage
Puts a pizza into storage, blocking if full.
put(T) - Method in class ru.nsu.krasnyanskii.pizzeria.BlockingOrderQueue
Inserts an element, blocking until space is available.

Q

QUEUED - Enum constant in enum class ru.nsu.krasnyanskii.pizzeria.Order.State

S

save(List<Order>, String, PizzeriaView) - Static method in class ru.nsu.krasnyanskii.pizzeria.OrderSerializer
Serializes orders to a JSON file.
serializerSaved(int, String) - Method in class ru.nsu.krasnyanskii.pizzeria.PizzeriaView
Prints a serializer-saved confirmation.
setState(Order.State) - Method in class ru.nsu.krasnyanskii.pizzeria.Order
Updates the state and notifies the view if one is present.
shutdownStarted() - Method in class ru.nsu.krasnyanskii.pizzeria.PizzeriaView
Prints the shutdown-started banner.
size() - Method in class ru.nsu.krasnyanskii.pizzeria.BlockingOrderQueue
Returns the number of elements currently in the queue.
size() - Method in class ru.nsu.krasnyanskii.pizzeria.PizzaStorage
Returns the number of pizzas currently in storage.
stop() - Method in interface ru.nsu.krasnyanskii.pizzeria.Stoppable
Requests the worker to finish after completing its current task.
stop() - Method in class ru.nsu.krasnyanskii.pizzeria.workers.Baker
 
stop() - Method in class ru.nsu.krasnyanskii.pizzeria.workers.Courier
 
stop() - Method in class ru.nsu.krasnyanskii.pizzeria.workers.OrderGenerator
 
Stoppable - Interface in ru.nsu.krasnyanskii.pizzeria
Abstraction for softly stoppable workers.

T

take() - Method in class ru.nsu.krasnyanskii.pizzeria.BlockingOrderQueue
Retrieves and removes the head element, blocking until one is available.
take(int) - Method in class ru.nsu.krasnyanskii.pizzeria.PizzaStorage
Takes up to maxCount pizzas, blocking while storage is empty and open.

V

valueOf(String) - Static method in enum class ru.nsu.krasnyanskii.pizzeria.Order.State
Returns the enum constant of this class with the specified name.
values() - Static method in enum class ru.nsu.krasnyanskii.pizzeria.Order.State
Returns an array containing the constants of this enum class, in the order they are declared.

W

workingFor(long) - Method in class ru.nsu.krasnyanskii.pizzeria.PizzeriaView
Prints how long the pizzeria will run.
